title: carex phaenocarpa
intro: Carex phaenocarpa, also known as false-fruit sedge, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the sedge family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Carex phaenocarpa include reducing inflammation, relieving stress, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
